Module com.trifasico.x50zo
Package com.trifasico.x50zo.view

Class GameView

java.lang.Object
com.trifasico.x50zo.view.GameView
public class GameView extends Object
Handles all UI rendering, layout coordination, and visual animations for the game screen.

Following the MVC paradigm, this class treats all nodes as passive visual containers. It coordinates the architectural separation of opposing player hands across the screen walls and encapsulates all JavaFX transition layers.

Version:
1.2
Author:
Yostin Ramirez, Lesly Zapata, Joseph Terreros

    • setTurnStyleClass

      public void setTurnStyleClass(String styleClass)
      Updates the CSS style classes of the turn label to allow for distinct semantic rendering (e.g., normal turn vs player elimination alerts).
      Parameters:
      styleClass - the target CSS class defined in your stylesheet

    • renderMachineHands

      public void renderMachineHands(List<IPlayer> machines)
      Distributes machine player interfaces across layout anchors depending on active count. Machines 1 and 2 are rendered side by side within the top boundary box. Machine 3 is isolated and rotated counter-clockwise inside the right-hand boundary container facing inward.

    • animateCardPlay

      public void animateCardPlay(Card card)
